description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, set on a rectangular paved lot. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and a main entryway with a covered porch area, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of dark and light neutral tones, with clean, unornamented surfaces. A single red car is parked on the lot, and there are several bollards or posts marking the perimeter. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially open to the exterior. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some smaller windows on the sides and back. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing geometric lines and functional simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and minimalist exterior in neutral tones, set on a paved lot with a red car and perimeter posts.
description_view_0: The rear of the house, showing a plain dark wall with a small window and minimal architectural detail.
description_view_1: A side view with a light-colored wall, a small entry door, and a window, plus the red car parked nearby.
description_view_2: The front of the house, featuring large glass windows, the main entryway with a covered porch, and visible interior furnishings.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, showing a light wall with a single door and a partial view of the car and posts.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, large glass doors, and minimal decorative elements
